overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a tan coat walking through Night City. The character travels along elevated sidewalks past neon billboards, crosses a street with passing traffic, and continues under a massive concrete overpass toward the setting sun between futuristic skyscrapers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past digital billboards, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple levels of glowing red and white advertisements
elevated highway ramp with distinctive red trim and light trails
tall rotating digital advertisement screen showing various commercials
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete sidewalk elevated beside a curved red highway. A massive cylindrical advertisement tower dominates the left side while rotating digital billboards line the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead as the camera approaches a crosswalk in the distance.

events.description: blue sports car drives past the crosswalk from right to left
approaching and entering the shadow of the concrete overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and walking across the street toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: blue sports car speeding past the crosswalk perpendicular to the camera path

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
massive concrete pedestrian and vehicle overpass creating shadow ahead

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a blue sports car speeds past. The cylindrical tower recedes into the distance on the left while a massive concrete overpass looms ahead, casting a shadow over the street. Traffic lights and crossing signals mark the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath massive overpass structure

events.description: entering deep shadow under the concrete overpass, lighting becomes darker and mixed with neon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass through the shadowed corridor

entered.detail: massive concrete support structure and overhead bridge creating a covered tunnel effect
large vertical digital screens mounted on the overpass pillars showing advertisements
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive concrete overpass, entering a shadowed corridor with mixed neon and natural lighting. Digital screens line the right side of the structure while the left side features safety railings. The environment is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating a darker, enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon facing sunset between skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the overpass into bright golden hour sunlight shining directly ahead between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the setting sun between towering skyscrapers, emerging from the shadowed overpass

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrians walking toward the sunset in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark building with prominent purple 'DATA INC' neon signage
bright golden sunlight streaming through the gap between futuristic skyscrapers ahead
tall vertical neon advertisement strips running down the building facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass shadow, the character walks into bright golden hour sunlight streaming between futuristic skyscrapers. The Data Inc building with its purple neon sign dominates the left side while vertical neon advertisements line the right. The camera walks directly toward the setting sun, creating a warm backlit atmosphere in the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from an open elevated sidewalk into a shadowed underpass before emerging into a brilliant golden sunset. It begins with the character walking along a wide concrete path beside a curved red highway, flanked by a massive cylindrical advertisement tower and rotating digital billboards. As the character reaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, a blue sports car speeds past and the scene shifts toward a looming concrete overpass that casts a deep shadow over the intersection. The camera then follows the character beneath this massive structure, moving through a sheltered, darker corridor lined with digital screens and safety railings. Finally, the scene opens up as the character emerges from the shadows into bright golden hour sunlight streaming between futuristic skyscrapers, walking directly toward the setting sun past the purple neon sign of the Data Inc building.
